results.evidence: plans table schema in src/db/schema/plans.ts with all required fields
GET /api/plans returns active plans sorted by sortOrder with 5-min cache
Admin /admin/plans page created with plan listing
Edit modal allows editing name, amount, SKU limit, image/video limits, features, description
PUT /api/admin/plans/[id] saves changes to database with updatedAt timestamp
Active/inactive toggle implemented in edit form and Zod schema
/pricing page fetches from /api/plans with fallback hardcoded values
/subscribe page loads plans from DB via SSR with eq(active, true)
subscription.ts has getPlanSkuLimit() and getPlanLimits() functions
New subscriptions query current plan limits from DB at runtime
getPlanSkuLimit() always queries DB for renewed subscriptions
Existing subscriptions retain original limits via planType stored in orders
